string-array.name: encouragements_friend
string-array.item: Sometimes the best plan is just to breathe, drink tea, and not demand heroics from yourself.
Your vulnerability doesn\'t make you weak; it makes you real. And that\'s the most valuable thing.
I love you not for who you "should" be, but for who you are right now.
Allow yourself to be "out of battery." We all need a recharge sometimes, and that\'s okay.
Your laughter is my favorite soundtrack. May it play more often in your life.
Don\'t apologize for taking up space. You have every right to be here, loud and noticed.
If you just survived today, that\'s already a victory. Tomorrow will be easier, I\'m here.
We can just be silent together. You don\'t need to entertain me for me to stay.
Your "quirks" aren\'t bugs, they\'re unique features. Don\'t "update" yourself for others.
Hugging you so tight that all your worries exhale along with you.
You don\'t have to be perfect to be loved. You are already enough.
Let\'s agree: when the world pushes, we take a step back, not forward.
Your intuition whispers while logic screams. Listen to the whisper today.
I\'m proud of how you take care of yourself, even when the world doesn\'t notice.
You\'re like a fine wine: you get even better when you stop trying to fit someone else\'s label.
You\'re awesome, girl!
Today is a great day to be happy!
You\'ll handle it, even if it feels like everything is falling apart right now.
Your smile could warm an entire city.
Coffee is brewed, and problems can wait.
You shine brighter than a smartphone screen on max brightness.
Listen, even if you only washed your hair today—you\'re the hero of the day!
Buy that chocolate. Your brain asked for it—give it what it wants!
You look like a ten, even if you don\'t think so yourself.
If life gives you lemons—bring the tequila, let\'s talk!
Your style is literally fire. I love your taste!
One small victory today is already a huge step.
Forget those who didn\'t appreciate you. They just haven\'t grown to your level yet.
You\'re like a rare wine: getting more interesting and cooler every day.
Remember: you are the grand prize, not a consolation bonus.
Even in pajamas and a messy bun, you look like a style icon.
Send me a selfie; I\'ll give you 100 reasons why you\'re a goddess.
The world can wait while we finish this tea (or something stronger).
You\'re my favorite reason to believe that cool people exist.
If someone hurt you—tell me, I\'m already looking for their address (kidding, but I\'m here!).
If today is a lemon, where\'s our salt and tequila?
You look so cool that even your exes\' exes are jealous.
Your intuition never lies, but that guy might. Listen to yourself!
We\'re like two Twix bars—sweeter and more fun together.
Even if you procrastinated all day, you did it with damn good style.
Remember: calories in dessert don\'t count if we eat it together.
You\'re like a rare iOS update: everyone wants it, but not everyone can handle it.
Stop analyzing his texts, let\'s go pick out some new shoes instead!
Your charisma breaks through even the worst Wi-Fi.
If the world goes crazy, we\'ll just build our own—with blackjack and kittens.

string-array.name: encouragements_sister
string-array.item: We\'ve shared not just secrets, but silence. I value every minute of it with you.
You are my life\'s first witness. Thank you for growing up with me, even when we\'re far apart.
Your exhaustion isn\'t a sentence, it\'s a plea for care. Let yourself receive it fully.
I remember you small, I see you now, and I already love the woman you will become.
Our disagreements are just commas in the long sentence called "us."
Don\'t carry it all alone. My doorstep is always open for your tears and your big hopes.
You are part of my foundation. When you stand strong, it\'s easier for me to breathe too.
Allow yourself to make mistakes. I\'ll still consider you my greatest achievement.
Your kindness is our family treasure. Guard it, but don\'t let it drain you.
When the world is too loud, know that you have my quiet but reliable "I\'m here."
You grow, and I grow with you. Thank you for walking with me, even when the path winds.
Don\'t compare yourself to others. You have your own story, roots, and rhythm.
I believe in your "tomorrows" as much as I believe in our "yesterdays."
Your right to be imperfect and just alive—I will always protect that.
Hugging you across the years and miles. You are my blood joy and quiet harbor.
Hang in there, sis, I\'m always on your side.
Let yourself be imperfect; that\'s where your real magic is.
Your body is your home. Take care of it today with great love.
The world needs exactly what only you have.
Buy those flowers. Just because. For your favorite person—yourself.
You are stronger than you think and wiser than you feel right now.
If the day didn\'t go well, remember: tomorrow is a blank slate and a new chance.
Wear what makes you feel like a real queen.
Your dreams are worth fighting for. Don\'t give up.
Remember: you are the best thing that ever happened in my life.
Your voice matters. Never let it be silenced.
I know your strength, even when you doubt it yourself.
You are the spark that ignites great ideas.
Rest. The whole world will wait while you regain your strength.
To me, you\'re always number one, no matter your mood.
Just breathe. You\'re already doing enough just by being yourself.
Your kindness isn\'t weakness; it\'s your greatest power.
I\'m proud of every little victory of yours that no one knows about.
Remember that you deserve care not only when you\'re "productive."
Hugging you tight through all the miles. You are my inspiration.
There\'s a strength in you that you don\'t even realize, but I see it.
Just know: I\'m always on your side, even if the whole world is against you.
Your "flaws" are just unique features that make you you.
Don\'t compare your first step to someone else\'s hundredth. Go at your own pace.
Your feelings matter. If you want to cry—cry, I\'ll hold your hand.
You deserve all the best just because you exist.
Hugging you in my thoughts. You\'re my closest person and my reason for pride.
Let yourself just "be" today, instead of "achieving."
Your soul shines so bright that no clouds can dim it.
You are a treasure, and I won\'t get tired of reminding you of that every day.

string-array.name: encouragements_coach
string-array.item: Success isn\'t a race to exhaustion; it\'s a marathon at your own pace. Listen to your body.
Your "shoulds" must one day become "wants." Until then, give yourself time and space.
Boundaries aren\'t about "no," they\'re about a hungry "yes" to yourself and your values.
Rest isn\'t a reward for productivity; it\'s the fuel for it. Refuel before driving further.
You have the right to change your mind. Growth is a spiral that brings you back to yourself.
Stop waiting for the "right moment." It\'s created by your first, albeit shaky, step.
Your value isn\'t measured by checkboxes on a task list. You are valuable just by existing.
Discipline without self-compassion leads to burnout. Be firm with the goal, but soft with yourself.
Don\'t confuse others\' expectations with your ambitions. Quietly take the wheel back.
Fear of change is just respect for what you hold dear. Act carefully, but act.
Your goal is your happiness. Onward to the peaks!
Your success is the best revenge on everyone who ever doubted you.
An ex is just a level you\'ve already passed. Forget it, a new boss is ahead!
Mean girls at work are just mad because they can\'t be as cool as you.
Forget him. You\'re a diamond, and he just doesn\'t know jewelry.
Your "no" is your superpower. Use it without guilt.
Boundaries aren\'t walls; they\'re filters for worthy people in your life.
Invest in yourself. It\'s the only stock that always goes up.
You are the author of your story. Don\'t let anyone else hold the pen.
Mistakes are just the tax on experience. Pay it and move on.
Don\'t waste your magic on those who don\'t know how to be amazed by it.
Your time is too expensive to waste on toxic people.
If someone tries to bring you down, it means you\'re already way above them.
You\'re not "one of many," you\'re the original. We aren\'t interested in copies.
Stand up, straighten your crown, and go change the world to fit you!
Haters are your free advertising agents. Let them work!
Stop checking his stories; better check your bank balance.
You don\'t have to be convenient. You have to be happy and successful.
Your potential is limitless, so don\'t you dare lower it for someone else\'s comfort.
In any confusing situation, bet on yourself. You won\'t lose.
Your fear is just a signpost showing you where you need to go to grow.
Either you run the day, or the day runs you. You choose.
Thinking too much, doing too little. Just start; the appetite comes with the doing.
Your comfort zone is a trap. Real life begins where it feels scary.
Stop apologizing for your success. You earned it with your hard work.
If you\'re the smartest person in the room, you\'re in the wrong room. Find scale!
Don\'t wait for inspiration; create discipline. It\'ll take you where motivation won\'t reach.
You\'re not "difficult," you just have high standards. Don\'t lower the bar.
Your energy is currency. Don\'t spend it on those who don\'t bring dividends.
Yesterday\'s limits are today\'s opportunities. Flip the game!
